methodology_note: Hand-labeled by the author (no public dataset annotates manipulation tactics). Messages are illustrative and PII-masked with placeholders. Category names come from specs/02_taxonomy.md; expected_levers are the ground truth the LLM-as-judge scores extraction coverage against. Disclose this curation in the writeup. Includes 3 legitimate look-alikes to test over-flagging within this set.

cases.message: 🚀 LAST CHANCE: our AI trading bot returns a GUARANTEED 300% in 7 days. Only 5 investor slots left tonight. Send USDT to [[WALLET]] now to lock your spot.
Congrats, your account shows a [[AMOUNT]] profit! To withdraw, first pay a 15% release fee to [[WALLET]]. Thousands of members withdraw daily — see our testimonials.
I know we only matched last week but I feel like I've known you forever [[NAME]]. You're my soulmate. I want to build a future with you.
My darling, customs is holding my inheritance shipment and I need [[AMOUNT]] today or I lose everything. Please don't mention this to anyone — they wouldn't understand us.
SECURITY ALERT: unusual login on your bank account. Your account will be SUSPENDED in 24 hours. Verify your identity immediately at [[URL]].
Your parcel could not be delivered due to unpaid customs of [[AMOUNT]]. Reschedule within 12h or it will be returned: [[URL]]
OFFICIAL NOTICE: You have WON [[AMOUNT]] in the International Email Lottery! You never need to have entered. Pay a [[AMOUNT]] processing fee to release your winnings.
Microsoft Support: we detected 5 viruses on your computer. Call [[PHONE]] now and allow remote access so our technician can remove them before your files are lost.
Dear beneficiary, I am a bank director. A client with your surname died leaving [[AMOUNT]] unclaimed. Send a small transfer fee and we split it 50/50. Strictly confidential.
Hi, it's the CEO. I'm in a meeting and can't talk. We have a confidential acquisition — wire [[AMOUNT]] to this new vendor account today. Updated details attached. Keep this quiet.
Join the private signals group — members made 10x last month (screenshots below). Deposit any amount and our algorithm guarantees daily profit with zero risk.
Sweetheart, please open an account on this special platform I use for trading. I'll guide you. Don't tell your bank — they charge huge fees and will only slow us down.
IRS FINAL NOTICE: a warrant will be issued for your arrest over unpaid taxes unless you settle [[AMOUNT]] today via gift cards. Do not ignore this legal matter.
You're our lucky winner of a new iPhone! Only the first 3 people to claim get it. Confirm your address and pay [[AMOUNT]] shipping in the next 10 minutes: [[URL]]
Your Amazon order #114-2938471 has shipped and will arrive Tuesday. Track your package in the Amazon app or at amazon.com. No action needed.
Your March statement is now available. Log in to your online banking through the app to view it. We will never ask for your password or a one-time code by phone or email.
Your verification code is 483920. It expires in 10 minutes. If you did not request this, you can ignore this message.
cases.notes: Legit-looking 2FA lookalike — a hard false-positive test; scammers mimic this, but alone (no link, no request) it is benign.

cases.message: This is Apple Support. Your iCloud was breached. Install our remote tool from [[URL]] and share the code on screen so we can secure your account right now.
ALERTA: Su cuenta bancaria ha sido suspendida por actividad sospechosa. Verifique su identidad inmediatamente en [[URL]] o perderá acceso permanente. Tiene 24 horas.
cases.notes: Spanish-language phishing SMS — tests multi-language detection and lever extraction

cases.message: Cher bénéficiaire, je suis un directeur de banque au Togo. Un client portant votre nom de famille est décédé en laissant [[AMOUNT]] non réclamés. Envoyez des frais de transfert et nous partageons 50/50. Strictement confidentiel.
cases.notes: French-language advance-fee scam — tests multi-language detection for French

cases.message: Binabati kita! Nanalo ka ng [[AMOUNT]] sa International SMS Raffle! Kailangan mong magbayad ng [[AMOUNT]] processing fee para makuha ang premyo. Mag-click sa [[URL]] ngayon bago mag-expire ang claim mo sa loob ng 24 oras.
cases.notes: Tagalog-language prize/lottery scam — tests multi-language detection for Tagalog/Filipino
